sql_array: CREATE TABLE products (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, details JSON, price INT);
INSERT INTO products (details, price) VALUES (json '{"price": null, "description": "A test product"}', 10);
SELECT json.filter(details, '$..price') << 1 AS increased_price FROM products WHERE json.filter(details, '$..price') IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, json.filter(details, '$..price') AS price, (json.filter(details, '$..price') << 2) AS shifted_price FROM products WHERE price > json.filter(details, '$..price') << 1;
CREATE TABLE sales (sale_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, product_id INT, sale_price INT, FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id));

WITH price_filtered AS (SELECT product_id, sale_price, json.filter(details, '$..price') AS json_price FROM sales INNER JOIN products ON sales.product_id = products.id) SELECT product_id, sale_price << 1 AS double_price FROM price_filtered HAVING json_price IS NOT NULL;
SELECT sale_id, product_id, (json.filter(details, '$..price') << 3) AS quadrupled_price FROM sales JOIN products ON sales.product_id = products.id ORDER BY quadrupled_price DESC;
SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) AS num_sales FROM sales GROUP BY product_id HAVING COUNT(*) > (json.filter((SELECT details FROM products WHERE id = 1), '$..price') << 1);
